CVE-2024-10527.title: The Spacer plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized acc ...
CVE-2024-10527.description: The Spacer plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access of data due to a missing capability check on the motech_spacer_callback() function in all versions up to, and including, 3.0.7. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and above, to view limited setting information.
